caption: A blonde woman wearing a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" visible on the front is speaking in front of a solid purple backdrop. She wears a small, skin-colored headset microphone near her mouth. As she speaks, she shifts her gaze and facial expressions, beginning with a neutral expression looking forward, then turning her head slightly to the right while gesturing with her hands. She then looks back toward the center with a slight smile before returning to an active speaking expression with her mouth open. To her right, the arm and shoulder of another person wearing a gray garment are partially visible, though they remain mostly out of frame. The woman stays in a seated position throughout the sequence, with the camera focusing on her from the chest up against the consistent purple background.
